parameters.jsCode:
const decision = $('Décision chauffage').first().json;

return [{
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  temp_interieure: decision.temp_interieure,
  temp_exterieure: decision.temp_exterieure,
  consigne_actuelle: decision.consigne_actuelle,
  cible: decision.cible,
  target_mode: decision.target_mode,
  action: decision.action,
  reason: decision.reason,
  delayOk: decision.delayOk,
  targetChangedEnough: decision.targetChangedEnough,
  debug_solaire: decision.debug_solaire,
  debug_thermique: decision.debug_thermique
}];
